name: Creole Mustard Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Crushed garlic packed in oil
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine all ingredients for the Creole mustard mixture.
2. Mix together all sauce ingredients separately.
3. Stir the Creole mustard mixture and the sauce mixture together until well combined.
4. Serve with Planet Hollywood Chicken.
